label: Default follow-up
text: Get your shoes on and come to the car.

existingTranslations.translation: The car is ready, and shoes are part of getting out the door.
It looks like shoes and heading to the car are the next part.
The driveway is waiting, and shoes help with getting there.
I wonder what would make shoes and the walk to the car feel easier.

translations.translation: The car is all ready to go; it's waiting in the driveway. It looks like shoe-wearing time, then out to the car.
It's time for the car adventure. Shoes go on our feet, then we head for the car.
The car is sitting outside, ready for our trip. Shoes are usually a good idea for the walk to the car.
Our ride is waiting. I wonder if shoes first, then a quick dash to the car, might feel easiest.

translations.translation: The shoes are right by the door, and the car will be just outside.
Stepping into shoes comes before walking out to the car.
Having shoes on helps with getting to the car comfortably.

label: Interest Based follow-up
text: Please come to the bathroom, brush your teeth, and bring your dinosaur to bed.

existingTranslations.translation: The bathroom is the next stop, and the dinosaur can head to bed after teeth are done.
It looks like toothbrush time came before the dinosaur bedtime expedition.
The sink is ready, and the dinosaur can travel to bed when teeth are sorted out.
I wonder how the dinosaur bedtime route goes once teeth are taken care of.

translations.translation: The bathroom light is on; the toothbrush is ready for action. Dinosaur friends often enjoy a quick stop here before settling into their sleeping spot.
It looks like the toothbrush is waiting, and then it will be time for your dinosaur's journey to bed.
The bathroom is open, and a little later, it'll be time to get your dinosaur tucked in. I wonder if your dinosaur is ready for teeth-brushing time before bed.
The toothpaste is on the counter, and soon after, the dinosaur will be ready to head for bed. The bathroom is all set.

translations.translation: The toothbrush is waiting by the sink, and then the dinosaur can go on a bedtime journey.
The path from here leads to the bathroom, and once teeth are brushed, the dinosaur is all set for bed.
Getting the dinosaur ready for bed will happen right after teeth are brushed, and the bathroom is where that starts.
A clean mouth and a sleepy dinosaur making their way to bed sounds like a good plan.

label: Fewer Words follow-up
text: Wash your hands and come to the kitchen for lunch.

existingTranslations.translation: Hands first, then the kitchen for lunch.
The sink is next, and lunch is waiting in the kitchen.
Looks like handwashing and the kitchen go together right now.
Lunch is nearly ready once hands are sorted out.

outputs.label: Current follow-up prompt
outputs.prompt:

translations.translation: Hand washing usually happens before we eat. Lunch is ready in the kitchen.
I notice the sink is available, then the kitchen is ready for lunch.
Lunch is waiting in the kitchen. Hand washing would be next, then coming to the table.
The kitchen will be set for lunch as soon as hands are washed.

translations.translation: The sink area is open, and then the kitchen is set for lunch.

label: Multi-part follow-up
text: Please come to the bathroom, get your pajamas on, and bring your book to bed.

existingTranslations.translation: The bathroom is the first stop, and pajamas plus a book seem to be part of the path to bed.
It looks like bathroom, pajamas, and book are all teaming up for bedtime.
I could use a second set of eyes on the bedtime order: bathroom, pajamas, then book to bed.
The bed seems to be waiting on a bathroom stop, pajamas, and a book.

outputs.label: Current follow-up prompt
outputs.prompt:

Avoid starting multiple suggestions with "I", "I'm", "I am", "my", "we", or "our". Tone: Use an "Equalizing" tone. Frame the situation as collaborative or as if the child has useful perspective. If the adult needs help or a second opinion, keep it warm and light, not mocking, helpless, or performatively foolish. Preserve dignity and felt safety.

Use different openings and avoid repeating stock frames.

translations.translation: The bathroom is ready, and it looks like pajamas are calling for a story in bed soon.
It's time for settling down; the bathroom, pajamas, and a good book are all part of the bedtime journey.
Pajamas and a book are waiting for us right after a quick stop in the bathroom.
I wonder if we should head to the bathroom first, then get those pajamas on, and grab a book for bed.

translations.translation: The bathroom lights are on, and the pajamas are out for getting ready with your book for bed.
Moving from the bathroom to pajamas, and then your book to bed, completes the evening flow.
The pajamas are right here, ready for the trip from the bathroom with your book to bed.
Getting to the bathroom, into pajamas, and tucking in with your book often helps us all settle for the night.
